name: Block
effect: Reaction: After a ranged attack has been rolled against this fighter but before damage is calculated, change a crit to a hit.

name: Brutal
effect: A fighter can only use this ability if an enemy fighter has been taken down by an attack action or ability made by this fighter during this activation. This fighter makes a bonus attack action.

name: Cleaving
effect: Allocate a number of damage points equal to half the value of this ability (rounding up) to all visible enemy fighters within 1" of this fighter.

name: Crushing
effect: Until the end of the Mission round, increase the Weapon Skill of attacks with this weapon by 2.

name: Overwhelming
effect: After an attack with this weapon does damage, push the fighter who took damage back 2 inches.

name: Parry
effect: Reaction: A fighter can make this reaction after they have been hit by a melee attack action but before damage is assigned. Change one hit from that attack action to a miss (this cannot modify a crit).

name: Piercing
effect: Until the end of the Mission round, attacks with this weapon crit one step earlier (e.g. if it would crit on a 6 it now also crits on a 5, if it couldn't crit then it would crit on a 6).

name: Precise
effect: Until the end of the Mission round, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of attack actions made by this weapon.

name: Quick
effect: Before attacking with this weapon, this fighter can take a 2 inch move (but not disengage).

name: Riposte
effect: Reaction: A fighter can make this reaction after a melee attack targeting them was rolled with no hits or crits, the attacker takes one hit's worth of damage from the Riposte weapon.

name: Spiked
effect: Allocate a number of damage points equal to half the value of this ability to a fighter who has taken damage from this weapon this turn.

name: Sprint
effect: Increase the movement value of this fighter by 1 until the end of their activation.

name: Thrown
effect: Pick a visible enemy fighter within 6" of this fighter and roll 2 dice. For each roll of 4-5, allocate 1 damage point to that fighter. For each roll of 6, allocate a number of damage points to that fighter equal to the value of this ability.
